old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ymtm","title":"[security] schnorr48_pubkey_valid not constant-time","description":"schnorr48_pubkey_valid() early-returns on first crypto_verify32 match in loop over 8 low-order points (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:199).
